Container.Name: iplayer-arr
Container.Overview: BBC iPlayer Newznab indexer and SABnzbd-compatible download client for Sonarr. Lets Sonarr discover and grab BBC iPlayer content with no separate Newznab indexer required and no Perl/get-iplayer dependency. Calls the BBC iBL API directly and remuxes HLS to MP4 with ffmpeg. Includes an optional WireGuard VPN client (built on the hotio base image) for use outside the UK. By default the VPN is disabled. Set VPN_ENABLED=true and configure the VPN settings in the advanced section if you are running from outside the UK -- BBC iPlayer requires a UK IP address. After installing, open the WebUI and follow the Setup Wizard to connect Sonarr.
Container.Description: BBC iPlayer Newznab indexer and SABnzbd-compatible download client for Sonarr. Optional built-in WireGuard VPN for use outside the UK.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the iplayer-arr web interface and Newznab/SABnzbd APIs.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Config files, database, override files and logs.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Where finished BBC content is written. Point Sonarr's import path at the same location.

Config.Name: VPN: Enabled
Config.Description: Enable the built-in WireGuard VPN client. Required for use outside the UK. When enabled, set VPN_PROVIDER and either supply PIA credentials below OR drop your own WireGuard config at /config/wireguard/wg0.conf.

Config.Name: VPN: Provider
Config.Description: VPN provider. Use 'pia' to auto-configure Private Internet Access via the credentials below. Use 'generic' if you are supplying your own WireGuard config file.

Config.Name: VPN: WireGuard config name
Config.Description: Filename (without .conf) of your WireGuard config inside /config/wireguard/. Default is wg0 which matches /config/wireguard/wg0.conf.

Config.Name: VPN: LAN network
Config.Description: Your LAN subnet in CIDR notation. Allows Unraid and Sonarr on the LAN to keep talking to iplayer-arr while the VPN tunnel is active. Comma-separate multiple subnets.

Config.Name: VPN: PIA username
Config.Description: Private Internet Access username. Only used when VPN_PROVIDER=pia.

Config.Name: VPN: PIA password
Config.Description: Private Internet Access password. Only used when VPN_PROVIDER=pia.

Config.Name: VPN: PIA preferred region
Config.Description: PIA region ID. Must be a UK region for BBC iPlayer (e.g. uk_london, uk_manchester, uk_southampton).

Config.Name: VPN: Healthcheck
Config.Description: Stop the container if the VPN tunnel drops. Recommended when running behind a VPN.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for the running container. Unraid default is 99.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for the running container. Unraid default is 100.

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: File creation mask for files written by the container.
